purpose: G6 round-trip baseline — pre-tuning. Use as HPC optimization reference before G7 hyperparameter sweep.
notes: First clean run post normalization-fix. SHARP columns (totpot=4.68e24) caused gradient explosion in prior runs without z-score. feat_mean/feat_std in meta.json. Physics losses disabled (lambda_ode=0, lambda_mono=0). batch_size=64, lr=1e-3, 200 epochs, grad_clip=1.0.
